Page 56 | Rice & Grain Dishes

GARLIC MUSHROOM RISOTTO

Ingredients:
- 2 cups Arborio rice (or Carnaroli)
- 1 lb mixed mushrooms, sliced
- 6 cloves garlic, minced
- 1 small onion, finely diced
- 5-6 cups warm stock (vegetable or chicken)
- ½ cup dry white wine
- 3 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons olive oil
- ¼ cup grated Parmigiano-Reggiano
- 2 tablespoons fresh parsley, chopped
- Salt and black pepper to taste
- Thyme sprigs for garnish

Preparation:
1. Heat oil in large skillet, sauté mushrooms until golden, set asıde
2. In same pan, heat remaining oil and 1 tablespoon butter
3. Add onion and garlic, cook 2-3 minutes until fragrant
4. Add rice, stir constantly for 1-2 minutes until translucent edges
5. Pour in wine and stir until absorbed
6. Add warm stock one ladle at a time, stirring frequently
7. Wait until each addition is mostly absorbed before adding next
8. Continue for 18-20 minutes until rice is creamy but still al dente
9. Return mushrooms to pan, stir in remaining butter and cheese
10. Season with salt and pepper
11. Plate immediately, top with parsley and thyme, serve hot
